description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a before_script running "node -v" and "npm version", sets the NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL variable to warn, and caches the node_modules directory per job using a key of $CI_JOB_NAME. In the test stage, add a test:current job that uses the node:latest Docker image and executes "npm it". Also add a test:lts-12 job that uses the node:erbium image and executes "npm it". Both jobs inherit the before_script, cache settings, and variable.
